case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. LTX FREIGHT LLC AKA LTX FREIGHT LLC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 100210670) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LTX FREIGHT LLC AKA LTX FREIGHT LLC. $15,899.77 PRINCIPAL, $1,925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,583.68 INTEREST, $444.38 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,852.83, SEE SCANNED DOC
